# **We are one of nine Manufacturing Innovation Institutes established by the U.S. Department of Defense to advance new technology and capabilities**
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/4326a0e3-1555-4c53-af0f-1e4bf2279d31/10th+Anniversary+slider+image5.jpg)
# **Celebrating 10 years of innovation!**
# **Discover the stories behind AIM Photonics’ Top 10 milestone accomplishments that shaped the future of the U.S. photonic integrated circuit industry**
[ SEE ALL TOP 10 ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/top-10)
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/a5dce205-9754-4548-9710-f5c2511fffef/NFN+Cleanroom.png)
# **We provide end-to-end silicon photonic manufacturing that supports both current and future technologies**
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/ceb0f386-2d01-454a-b36f-e865bc48575d/IMG_6294.a.jpg)
# **Our Multi-Project Wafers shorten design time, improve manufacturing efficiency, and lower the cost of entry for companies to develop new silicon photonics applications**
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/742e7f9b-017f-4627-add3-6c8d81553894/iStock-623924526.png)
# **We help small and medium enterprises to develop innovative products and services by providing them with accessible technology on-ramps**
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/448f991f-0a01-4479-9d10-cccae5dda4c9/hangar-81779_1920.png)
# **We are one of nine Manufacturing Innovation Institutes established by the U.S. Department of Defense to advance new technology and capabilities**
![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/4326a0e3-1555-4c53-af0f-1e4bf2279d31/10th+Anniversary+slider+image5.jpg)
# **Celebrating 10 years of innovation!**
# **Discover the stories behind AIM Photonics’ Top 10 milestone accomplishments that shaped the future of the U.S. photonic integrated circuit industry**
[ SEE ALL TOP 10 ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/top-10)
We offer start-ups, designers and developers, and academic researchers access to a supporting infrastructure of services across the entire silicon photonics development cycle: design, simulation, fabrication, packaging, validation, and a path to volume manufacturing.
  * ## DESIGN ENABLEMENT
Our unique collaborations with software vendors and design companies address the challenges and fundamental changes needed for integrated photonics chip design.
[ Learn More ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/pdk)
  * ## PROTOTYPE DEVICES
AIM Photonics has a proven, reliable, dedicated photonics process flow that can accept custom designs, and our business model of multi-project wafers lowers the prototyping cost for a single buyer. 
[ Learn More ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/mpw)
  * ## TEST AND PACKAGING
Offerings are available for photonic and electronic packaging that take advantage of our state-of-the-art tool set where researchers can work to design and build unique packaged prototypes.
[ Learn More ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/tap)
  * ## DESIGN ENABLEMENT
Our unique collaborations with software vendors and design companies address the challenges and fundamental changes needed for integrated photonics chip design.
[ Learn More ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/pdk)
  * ## PROTOTYPE DEVICES
AIM Photonics has a proven, reliable, dedicated photonics process flow that can accept custom designs, and our business model of multi-project wafers lowers the prototyping cost for a single buyer. 
[ Learn More ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/mpw)
  * ## TEST AND PACKAGING
Offerings are available for photonic and electronic packaging that take advantage of our state-of-the-art tool set where researchers can work to design and build unique packaged prototypes.
[ Learn More ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/tap)

![worker in the Albany Nanotech Complex 300 mm foundry](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/1628560400952-HA77BIRZOKRY3T23NIE0/IMG_6059.jpg)
### EDUCATION AND WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT
AIM Photonics is committed to addressing the specialized needs of the growing integrated photonics manufacturing infrastructure, with efforts focused on developing the critical skills required for the design, manufacture, testing, and packaging of U.S. foundry-based integrated photonics.
[ Learn more ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/education-workforce-development)

[ Contact Us ](https://www.aimphotonics.com/contact-us)
AIM Photonics is a manufacturing innovation institute (MII) established by the United States Department of Defense (DoD). The DoD MIIs bring new technologies to life with federal, taxpayer dollars combined with matching funds from academia, industry and state governments, building a national network of public-private partnerships and creating an industrial commons for manufacturing R&D, and workforce education and development. Marshalling the best talent across the country, the network strategically aligns resources to address critical technologies and drive interconnected manufacturing systems. 
![Department of Defense Manufacturing Innovation Institute logo](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60f9aafd6d3127604a69d48a/1632692046841-5NQN26V9YRE30MCSIS2G/-DoD+MII+-+Logo_FINAL_03-17-21_3x3.png)

AIM Photonics is a manufacturing innovation institute (MII) established by the United States Department of Defense (DoD). The DoD MIIs bring new technologies to life with federal, taxpayer dollars combined with matching funds from academia, industry and state governments, building a national network of public-private partnerships and creating an industrial commons for manufacturing R&D, and workforce education and development. Marshalling the best talent across the country, the network strategically aligns resources to address critical technologies and drive interconnected manufacturing systems.
